mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d') AS label, COUNT(SALE_ID) AS count, SUM(FINAL_PRICE) AS totalAmount FROM MST_SALES_info WHERE DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y-%m') = #{month} AND DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY label ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT HOUR(CREATE_TIME) AS label, COUNT(SALE_ID) AS count, SUM(FINAL_PRICE) AS totalAmount FROM MST_SALES_info WHERE DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{date} AND DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY label ORDER BY CAST(label AS UNSIGNED) ASC

SELECT d.MENU_NAME AS label, SUM(d.QUANTITY) AS count, SUM(d.UNIT_PRICE * d.QUANTITY) AS totalAmount FROM MST_SALES_info m JOIN DTL_SALES_info d ON m.SALE_ID = d.SALE_ID WHERE DATE_FORMAT(m.CREATE_TIME, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{date} AND HOUR(m.CREATE_TIME) = #{hour} AND m.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY label ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
